name: fill-gaps-v1-m2-default-webhook-effects
description: Provide default webhook effects, turnkey sync wiring, and Pay-like integrator ergonomics for Stripe projections.

userStories.title: Create default webhook effects module
userStories.description: As an app integrator, I want default webhook effects so that Stripe events sync local projections without custom effect authoring.
acceptanceCriteria: Introduce a default effects module mapping normalized webhook events to projection repository writes
Cover customer, payment method, charge or refund, invoice, and subscription projection updates
Preserve idempotent behavior for duplicate Stripe deliveries
bun test src/packages/stripe/__tests__ --test-name-pattern "default effects" passes
userStories.notes: Implemented src/packages/stripe/default-webhook-effects.ts and wired exports. Added default effects tests covering mapping + duplicate idempotency. Verified with bun test src/packages/stripe/__tests__ --test-name-pattern "default effects" (pass).

userStories.title: Add turnkey facade and express wiring
userStories.description: As an app integrator, I want a simple setup path so that default sync works with minimal configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Add additive registration options to enable default webhook effects while preserving custom overrides
Ensure connected-account context is propagated through default effects where present
Update setup docs and scripts/example-app/smoke.ts with canonical wiring
bun test src/packages/facade/__tests__ src/packages/express/__tests__ passes
userStories.notes: Added additive webhookRegistration options in facade preserving override precedence, propagated event.account into default effect Stripe request options, and updated docs/smoke wiring. Verified with bun test src/packages/facade/__tests__ src/packages/express/__tests__ (pass).

userStories.title: Add end-to-end webhook sync integration tests
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want end-to-end sync tests so turnkey behavior stays regression-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Add integration tests that validate signed webhook ingress through persisted projection state
Add replay tests proving duplicate event deliveries do not duplicate side effects
Add failure and retry tests proving dead-letter captures terminal failures
bun test src/packages/stripe/__tests__/integration --test-name-pattern "webhook" passes
userStories.notes: Expanded stripe webhook integration suite with signed ingress persistence validation, duplicate replay idempotency, and failure->retry->dead-letter terminal coverage. Verified with bun test src/packages/stripe/__tests__/integration --test-name-pattern "webhook" (pass).

userStories.title: Add owner-centric convenience APIs
userStories.description: As an app integrator, I want Pay-like convenience methods so processor setup and sync workflows are ergonomic.
acceptanceCriteria: Add additive facade methods for owner-centric processor setup equivalent to set payment processor behavior
Add convenience sync methods for customer and subscription reconciliation workflows
Document migration mapping from Pay idioms to Solidus convenience methods with code examples
bun test src/packages/facade/__tests__ --test-name-pattern "convenience" passes
userStories.notes: Added owner-centric convenience facade methods (setOwnerStripeProcessor, syncCustomer, syncSubscriptions) and Pay-to-Solidus migration docs/examples. Verified with bun test src/packages/facade/__tests__ --test-name-pattern "convenience" (pass).

userStories.title: Add first-class per-customer connected-account context
userStories.description: As a marketplace integrator, I want customer-scoped account context automatically applied so cross-account calls are correct by default.
acceptanceCriteria: Persist and resolve per-customer connected-account context for relevant billing operations
Apply resolved account context to Stripe request options across supported facade and sync calls
Add tests that prevent account context leakage across customers and events
bun test src/packages/stripe/__tests__ src/packages/facade/__tests__ --test-name-pattern "connected account" passes
userStories.notes: Persisted connectedAccountId on customer projections, resolved/fell back context per customer when event.account is missing, applied options across default effects + facade convenience sync calls, and added leakage prevention tests. Verified with bun test src/packages/stripe/__tests__ src/packages/facade/__tests__ --test-name-pattern "connected account" (pass).
